checks.name: non_automatable_boundary_enforcement
checks.description: system: actor_id rejected for all authority actions

checks.name: method_guard
checks.description: GET request to POST-only endpoint returns 405

checks.name: insufficiency_acknowledge_permanent
checks.description: Permanent insufficiency preserves blockers and unresolved state
checks.evidence: POST insufficiency_acknowledge with insufficiency_permanent=true → success, 6 blockers preserved, s_level stays S1

checks.name: event_log_append
checks.description: Event appended to promotion_event_log.jsonl with sequential ID
checks.evidence: EVT-003 appended after EVT-001, EVT-002 with semantic_disposition=INSUFFICIENCY_DETERMINATION

checks.name: replay_validation
checks.description: Event log replay reconstructs current state

checks.name: disclaimer_present
checks.description: _disclaimer field present on every API response
checks.evidence: _disclaimer: 'actor_id is DECLARATIVE ONLY. Not production RBAC. Not secure identity enforcement.'

checks.name: authority_page_renders_pallets_flask
checks.description: Authority page renders all 6 sub-components for pallets-flask
checks.evidence: HTTP 200, sqo-authority-panel, sqo-posture-banner, sqo-review-queue, sqo-promotion-control, sqo-blocker-list, sqo-event-timeline classes present in HTML

checks.name: blueedge_no_mutation_affordances
checks.description: BlueEdge authority page shows unavailable panel only
checks.evidence: Only sqo-authority-panel--unavailable class present, zero action buttons, zero input fields

checks.name: blueedge_overview_no_regression
checks.description: BlueEdge overview page still serves 200 OK

checks.name: zero_blueedge_files_in_diff
checks.evidence: git diff --name-only | grep blueedge returns empty

checks.name: semantic_disposition_correct
checks.description: Semantic disposition uses operational acceptance language

checks.name: blockers_preserved_after_insufficiency
checks.description: All 6 blockers remain unresolved after permanent insufficiency

checks.name: label_discipline
checks.description: UI labels use operational acceptance language
checks.evidence: ACTION_LABELS: review_accept='Operational Acceptance', review_reject='Operational Rejection'. No 'Semantic Truth' / 'Validated Meaning'

checks.name: mutations_scoped_to_pallets_flask
checks.description: All file mutations scoped to pallets-flask SQO artifacts only

checks.name: no_authentication_claimed
checks.description: No production RBAC or secure identity enforcement claimed
checks.evidence: _disclaimer on every response, footer disclaimer, execution_report disclaimer
